CREATE TABLE test_strings (id INT, str1 VARCHAR(50), str2 VARCHAR(50));
SELECT levenshtein(str1, str2, id, 1) FROM test_strings WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, levenshtein(str1, str2, id, 1) AS distance FROM test_strings WHERE distance < 3;
SELECT t1.id, levenshtein(t1.str1, t2.str2, t1.id, 1) AS distance FROM test_strings t1 JOIN test_strings t2 ON t1.id <> t2.id WHERE distance > 1;
SELECT id, levenshtein(str1, str2, id, 1) AS distance FROM (SELECT * FROM test_strings WHERE id IN (1, 2)) AS subquery WHERE distance IS NOT NULL;
CREATE TABLE additional_strings (s1 VARCHAR(50), s2 VARCHAR(50));
SELECT a.s1, a.s2, levenshtein(a.s1, a.s2, 7, 1) FROM additional_strings a;
SELECT r.id, r.distance FROM (SELECT id, levenshtein(str1, str2, id, 1) AS distance FROM test_strings) AS r WHERE r.distance BETWEEN 1 AND 3;
